validation_rules.Passport: Must be valid for at least 6 months. Ideal validity should cover the entire duration of the study program.
validation_rules.Letter of Acceptance: Must be from a Designated Learning Institution (DLI) with a valid DLI number and clearly outline tuition cost, program length, and start date.
validation_rules.Bank Statements: Must prove minimum $20,635 CAD living costs for SDS stream plus first-year tuition fees. Proof of Guaranteed Investment Certificate (GIC) of $20,635 CAD is mandatory for SDS.
validation_rules.Language Test: For Student Direct Stream (SDS), IELTS Academic overall band score of 6.0 or higher with no individual band score less than 6.0 is required.

critical_rules: Verify DLI status of target institution.
GIC payment of $20,635 CAD is mandatory for SDS filing.
Passport expiration date must be after targeted study program completion.
ai_instructions: Check for GIC certificate logs, verify DLI numbers, and double check that the passport is valid beyond program duration.
pass_examples: GIC of $20,635 CAD paid, Letter of Acceptance from DLI college, IELTS overall 6.5 band.
fail_examples: No GIC receipt attached, IELTS score band of 5.5, Passport expires in 3 months.
